Home / Quality Policy
Quality Commitment

Distinct in quality, consistent in delivery

Bombay Earthing employees adhere to and contribute to the efficiency of our quality system in every aspect of operations. Our commitment guarantees that clients receive surpassed quality and service — through a collaborative approach in which every team member understands the company's aims and operates successfully within their discipline.

We pledge to deliver quality people, quality products and quality service — at a fair price, on time, at the right place, with complete documentation.

ISO 9001:2008 Certified

Our quality checkpoints

First-Rate Quality

Consistent, first-rate quality and service on every order — domestic and export.

On-Time Delivery

Efficient production, distribution and logistics planning ensures on-time delivery every time.

Customer First

Customer satisfaction is our first priority — we strive to exceed expectations on every order.

Quality Checkpoints
Raw Material InspectionPurity & grade verification before production begins
In-Process TestingDimensional accuracy checked at every manufacturing stage
Coating ThicknessCopper bonding / galvanising depth verified per IS standard
Conductivity TestElectrical resistance verified before packing
Final InspectionVisual & dimensional check on every unit
DocumentationTest certificates issued with every despatch

Need test certificates or material datasheets?

We provide complete documentation with every order — domestic and export.

Request Documentation

India's trusted manufacturer, supplier, stockist and exporter of copper bonded earth rods, pipe electrodes, lightning arresters and earthing accessories — serving 550+ clients worldwide.
